feedback.text: I think something needs to be done to protect consumers from buying products that aren't given set expiration dates as they should like video games. Too long have we been putting hundreds of thousands of dollars into some of these companies just so they can rip everything they gave us from beneath our feet in one swell swipe. Companies like Nintendo offering to let us purchase games too hard to run on their consoles and stream them instead, but only as long as that streaming service is up. What about the hundreds of dollars of games I purchased? I'm just no longer allowed to use a product I purchase all because the producer feels it's outdated? In no way is this right and something needs to be done about it before more people fall victim to this absurd nonsense before these companies are towering over the world with our money as they essentially already are.
